calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Settlng First And Final Account And Report Of Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Gary Rothstein, Esq., via Zoom, for City National Bank, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges that there is no appearance this morning to object to the subject petition by Hollis Grant. Ms. Grant previously appeared to orally object and was given a deadline of Oct-10-2023 to file a formal objection. There is no objection on file. Accordingly, the court intends to take the matter under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Settlng First And Final Account And Report Of Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Continued To Oct-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Gary Rothstein appeared via zoom for City National Bank (petitioner).
Hollis Grant (pro per/objector).

This matter was previously pre-granted. Ms. Grant appeared to object to the petition. The Court will continue this matter to October 17, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Written objection due by October 10, 2023.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

Petition For Order Settlng First And Final Account And Report Of Trustee
